entries.failure: Phase 3.9 slide lab was too clean: fixed offset, no decoy gaps, p95=0.
entries.fix: Added texture, edge noise, multi decoy gaps, scale, DPR, canvas offset, and trajectory-sensitive metadata.
entries.result: slide hard 91/100, adversarial 29/50; overall candidate only.

entries.failure: Sequence select had no wrong-order or missing-point pressure.
entries.fix: Added randomized sequence prompts, rotated/noisy options, hard/adversarial degradation, and failure case writeback.
entries.result: seq_select hard 91/100, adversarial 29/50; failures preserved for training.

entries.failure: Aliyun-compatible slider baseline used a single obvious gap.
entries.fix: Added background compression, multi-gap decoys, shape interference, randomized DPR/viewport/canvas offset.

entries.failure: Spatial reasoning had fixed coordinates and weak coordinate transform pressure.
entries.fix: Added randomized object placement, canvas offset, scale, rotated shapes, and coordinate tolerance.

entries.failure: Phase 3.9 shield JS was static and lacked mutation, p99, 20-worker ladder, and browser-only negative eval.
entries.fix: Added /protected -> /shield redirect, per-run script hash, mutation input, time window, runtime contract, 11 negative evals, and 20-worker ladder.
entries.result: 500/500 dynamic JS cases, 11 negative eval ledger_delta=0, 1/2/5/10/20 worker ladder PASS.
